name: dnscat2
title: dnscat2
description:
DNS tunnel (metapackage)
This tool is designed to create an encrypted command-and-control (C&C) channel
over the DNS protocol, which is an effective tunnel out of almost every
network.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use dnscat2 because DNS tunnel (metapackage).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use dnscat2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair dnscat2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `dnscat2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
